message:
feat(fp-columnar): add where_cond_series/mask_series/replace_values/nonzero (frankenpandas-s4kf)

Four pandas-parity Column methods round out the conditional-
replacement and indexing surface:

- where_cond_series(cond, other) — pd.Series.where(cond, other) with
  `other` as a column aligned by position. Cond must be Bool; length
  mismatch returns LengthMismatch. Values drawn from `other` are cast
  through cast_scalar into self.dtype so callers can feed e.g. a Float
  `other` into an Int64 self and get proper coercion. Null cond
  propagates.
- mask_series(cond, other) — logical inverse of where_cond_series,
  same validation surface.
- replace_values(to_replace, replacement) — pairwise substitution
  over Scalar::semantic_eq; null entries can be targeted by listing
  Scalar::Null in to_replace. Length mismatch between the two lists
  returns LengthMismatch. Result dtype inferred from output.
- nonzero() — positions where the value is truthy and non-missing;
  mirrors np.nonzero / pd.Series.to_numpy().nonzero(). Handy for
  turning a Bool mask column into explicit integer positions.

Co-lands frankenpandas-7hvt (mask_series), wiqk (replace_values),
zlmp (nonzero).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
